name: Braised Red Cabbage with Cranberries
recipeIngredient: 1 tablespoon Olive oil or veg. oil
recipeInstructions:
1. Serve with turkey. Cabbage may be shredded in a food processor.
2. In a large saucepan, heat the oil over medium heat. Add brown sugar and garlic, and cook for 2 minutes until fragrant.
3. Stir in cranberries and vinegar. Cover and cook for about 5 minutes or until cranberries pop their skins.
4. Add shredded cabbage, wine (sub.cranberry juice), and vinegar to the saucepan. Cover and cook on low heat for about 20 minutes or until cabbage is tender; stir occasionally.
5. Stir in the remaining cranberries. Remove from heat and cover; let stand for 5 more minutes or until cranberries are warm.
6. Season with salt and pepper to taste. Serve hot or cold. Makes 4 cups. Prep time: 20 minutes, Cook time: about 30 minutes.
